extraction.one_line_summary: MARYCHKA Jakob survived being dropped on penultimate climb, relied on teammates to pace back, then sprinted to 5th stage win and overall victory.
tactical_patterns: Nippo-Vini Fantini isolated Marychka on climbs but teammate pacing neutered attacks when he was visibly dropped mid-stage.
RIOS Gregor (19yo Colombian) attacked solo with 7km remaining, gained 45 seconds, nearly took overall lead before caught at 1.6km.
United Healthcare opened sprint early for BOONRATANATHANAKORN, revealing willingness to sacrifice position for visible leadout rather than tactical patience.
Israeli Academy launched late attacks inside final 2km despite no sprint presence, suggesting deliberate GC disruption tactics.

rider_signals.MARYCHKA Jakob: negative-turned-positive: dropped on climb but recovered via team pacing, suggests vulnerable on sustained gradients but strong recovery capacity
rider_signals.RIOS Gregor: positive: 19yo Colombian nearly stole overall lead with 7km solo attack gaining 45 seconds, marked as dangerous wildcard
rider_signals.SZEINA Patrick: negative: mechanical flat tire with 7km remaining destroyed 4th place GC, terrible timing undermines reliability assessment
rider_signals.MORINI Nicholas: negative: dropped immediately when race hit climbs, confirming zero climbing capacity despite 2nd overall at 19 seconds
